changes.note: Docs-only sprint with CONTENT change_type. No Intelligence Core files in scope. HIGH is conservative and technically over-classified per SOP §10 HIGH risk triggers. However, HIGH is consistent with the approval controls specified in the prompt ('Do not merge until GPT architectural review and human approval' — prompt:250). Over-classification is safer than under-classification. Not a blocker.

Prompt hedges AUTHORITY_MAP.md update with explicit escape: 'If unsure whether to update AUTHORITY_MAP.md, do not update it; instead record in the final report that it should be reviewed by GPT/human' (prompt:98). Update is permitted only if clearly appropriate per existing pattern. Source content confirms the pattern is clear and the gap is real — update is appropriate. However, update must be minimal (one row in Strategy section) and must appear in the final report.

docs/sprints/beta_readiness/ directory may not exist. Prompt explicitly covers this: 'If the directory does not exist, create it' (prompt:108). Cursor must create the full directory path before creating BUILD_DELIVERABLE_REGISTER.md.

changes.detail: No backend/ssot/, backend/core/pipeline/, backend/core/analytics/, run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py, update_cursor_status.py, signal evaluator, compiler, assembler, or any runtime file in scope. No Intelligence Core exposure.
No .codex/, .vscode/, AGENTS.md tooling leakage risk. Only docs/ files in expected changed files list.
All shell commands use PowerShell syntax: git switch, git pull, git status --short, git switch -c, git diff --stat, git diff --name-only. No bash-only constructs present.

overall_verdict: HARDENED — all four authority paths confirmed to exist with source content read and cross-referenced. Front matter valid (all five fields). Definitive strategy document confirmed FINAL v1.0, self-declares canonical path, explicitly supersedes prior drafts. AUTHORITY_MAP.md gap confirmed (doc not yet registered; last updated 2026-05-04). Entry pattern is clear; AUTHORITY_MAP update is appropriate. Three non-blocking advisories: (1) HIGH risk is conservative for CONTENT-only sprint but consistent with specified approval controls; (2) AUTHORITY_MAP update must be minimal and reported; (3) docs/sprints/beta_readiness/ directory must be created if absent. No Intelligence Core exposure. No behavioural risk. Cursor may proceed.
